response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth, open-source contributions, and leadership in diverse projects, but lacks explicit experience in IT consulting, UML architecture modeling, and German language proficiency (only basic), which are critical for this executive-level role focused on client advisory and German-market compliance.
strengths: Extensive open-source contributions with GISCollective and DLang tools, aligning with digital sovereignty and open-source focus.
Proven leadership across full-stack development, DevOps setup, and mentoring via workshops and team projects.
Strong technical versatility across Linux, Python-adjacent ecosystems (Node.js, Docker), and high-performance systems.
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, falling far short of the required C1 level for client advisory and compliance.
No explicit evidence of UML modeling, IT architecture design for enterprise clients, or requirements management in consulting contexts.
Employment history shows consistent work with Indian companies, raising questions about familiarity with European IT consulting norms and regulatory environments.
